allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\" -Filter "node.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\npm.cmd","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\npm.cmd","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\npm.cmd","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\npm.cmd"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null)
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell($mods = @\('playwright','puppeteer','puppeteer-core','@playwright/test'\); foreach\($m in $mods\){ if\(Test-Path "node_modules\\$m"\){ Write-Output "present: $m" } }; Write-Output "---chrome---"; $chromePaths=@\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"\); foreach\($p in $chromePaths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Write-Output "browser: $p" } })

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)
